title: Welcome: What 247ROI Builds (And Why It Matters)
summary: A quick overview of what 247ROI does: capture missed leads, book appointments automatically, and recover revenue with AI systems that run 24/7.
keyTakeaways: Most businesses lose revenue after hours and on missed calls.
AI reception + follow-up can recover leads quickly and consistently.
A simple system beats complex tooling when ROI is the goal.

faqs.a: 247ROI builds AI-powered revenue systems that capture leads, book appointments, and follow up automatically.
Service businesses that rely on inbound calls/leads and want more booked jobs without hiring more staff.

title: Missed Calls Are Costing You $12,740/Week
summary: Missed calls aren’t a minor ops issue — they’re a direct revenue leak. Here’s the math, the real customer journey, and the simple system that stops leads from calling the next listing.
keyTakeaways: If a call hits voicemail, many buyers immediately call the next listing — and they rarely come back.
Missed calls compound: after-hours, job sites, and peak-season spikes all create silent revenue loss.
A 24/7 answering + instant follow-up system turns ‘we’ll call you back’ into booked jobs.
Your fastest growth lever is fixing the front door: answering, routing, booking, and follow-up.

faqs.q: How do I estimate what missed calls cost me?
faqs.a: Count missed calls from last week, then multiply by your average job value. If you want a more conservative number, multiply by your close rate instead of 100%.

faqs.q: What should happen when someone calls after-hours?
faqs.a: They should be answered immediately, asked a few qualifying questions, and either booked or routed — then receive a confirmation text so the lead doesn’t go cold.
Run the missed call calculator to estimate the leak, then book a quick call to map the simplest system that plugs it for your business.
